rows.description: Soluta Dno Rectori Scholaribus et Officiariis
rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. The description is clearly visible. gpt-5-mini had good notes on the spelling of 'Officiariis' but both arrived at the same correct transcription.
rows.section_header: Soluta Dno Rectori Scholaribus et Officiariis

rows.notes: This left-margin header was found by gpt-5-mini, but missed by gemini-flash. Visually confirmed that 'Ad Festum Natal:' is a distinct header. gpt-5-mini's transcription is accurate.

Gemini-flash correctly identified 'Stipendia' as a separate indented header for the following entries. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged it into the description of the first entry, constituting a structural error. Visually confirmed this as a header without monetary amounts.

rows.description: Pro Augment South Newton et Mart
rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash accurately transcribed the description and amounts. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly included 'Stipendia' in its description for this entry due to a structural misinterpretation of the ledger layout.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment made for the livings of South Newington and Mart (festival stipend).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment for South Newington and Mart, amounting to £19 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly identified the stylized '2' for pounds, unlike gpt-5-mini which misread it as '25'. The description's second word appears to be 'Jua' or 'qua' rather than 'due' (gemini-flash) or 'qna/vna' (gpt-5-mini). 'Jua' was chosen based on visual consistency with similar entries and clear letter shapes.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Jua Shiers, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly identified 3 pounds, while gpt-5-mini misread it as 33 pounds. The description's second word is 'Jua', correcting 'due' from gemini-flash and 'Vna' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Additional stipend paid to Jua Shiers (ditto from previous stipend entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional stipend paid to Jua Shiers, amounting to £3 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly identified 2 pounds, while gpt-5-mini misread it as 50 pounds. The description's first word is 'Pro', not 'Div', and the second is 'Jua', correcting 'due' from gemini-flash and '?na' from gpt-5-mini.
rows.english_description: Payment made for Jua Shiers (further stipend).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for Jua Shiers, amounting to £2 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. The first word is 'Ad' (as correctly identified by gpt-5-mini), while the last word is 'Annum' (as correctly identified by gemini-flash, correcting 'Anniv' from gpt-5-mini). Combined for accuracy.

Gemini-flash correctly identified 'Stipend' as a separate indented header. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly treated this as an entry, assigning amounts that belong to the subsequent line. Visually confirmed this as a header without monetary amounts.

Visually verified. Gemini-flash accurately transcribed the description and amounts. Gpt-5-mini's description for this row was incorrect, having shifted its entries due to prior structural misinterpretations.
rows.english_description: Payment for three parts of the Kidlington augmentation.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for three parts of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £32 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. The description and amounts are clearly visible. Both extractors provided good notes regarding the repeated description and abbreviation 'Kidling'.
rows.english_description: Payment for three parts of the Kidlington augmentation (additional sum).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for three parts of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £24 0s 6d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gpt-5-mini correctly identified 'D. J.' where gemini-flash only had 'D.'. The interpretation of 'St. John the Baptist' by gpt-5-mini is also a good contextual note. This is a left-margin header.

Gemini-flash correctly identified 'Stipendium' as a separate indented header. Gpt-5-mini incorrectly treated this as part of the description for the subsequent entry. Visually confirmed this as a header without monetary amounts.
Visually verified. Gemini-flash accurately transcribed the description and amounts. Gpt-5-mini's description was flawed due to its structural misinterpretation and misreading 'parte' as 'quarter'.
rows.english_description: Payment for the fourth part of the Kidlington augmentation at the St John Baptist feast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for the fourth part of the Kidlington augmentation, amounting to £33 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Both agreed on amounts. Gemini-flash's 'Jua' for the second word of the description is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Vna'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid to Jua Shiers, amounting to £11 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Both agreed on amounts. Gemini-flash accurately transcribed the description as 'Pro Jua Shiers', correcting gpt-5-mini's 'Stipend Vna Shiers'.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment for Jua Shiers, amounting to £18 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly identified 5 pounds, while gpt-5-mini misread it as 50 pounds. Gemini-flash's description is also more accurate, including the dash.
rows.english_description: Additional stipend paid to Jua Shiers (ditto).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Additional stipend paid to Jua Shiers, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus between extractors. The description is clearly visible. Gpt-5-mini provided good contextual notes regarding the abbreviation ('Michaelis'). This is a left-margin header.
Consensus between extractors. The description and amounts are clearly visible.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment for the living of Long Wittenham at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment for Long Wittenham, amounting to £24 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash correctly identified the 'ob' symbol indicating 0.5 pence, which gpt-5-mini missed. Gemini-flash's transcription of the place name 'Gwynegar' is also more accurate.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment for Gwynegar made at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment for Gwynegar, amounting to £22 6s 0.5d.

rows.notes: Visually verified. Gemini-flash accurately transcribed all numeric values and the fraction. Gpt-5-mini made significant errors in reading the pounds, shillings, and pence whole values for the total.
